'''yocharaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibrilized|fibrilized]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ch-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibrilized|fibrilized]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yocharaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yocharithi|yocharithi]] || [[word:yochariji|yochariji]] || [[word:yocharishi|yocharishi]] || [[word:yochariki|yochariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yocharuthuthu|yocharuthuthu]] || [[word:yocharujuju|yocharujuju]] || [[word:yocharushushu|yocharushushu]] || [[word:yocharukuku|yocharukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yocharuthu|yocharuthu]] || [[word:yocharuju|yocharuju]] || [[word:yocharushu|yocharushu]] || [[word:yocharuku|yocharuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yocharufthuf|yocharufthuf]] || [[word:yocharufjuf|yocharufjuf]] || [[word:yocharufshuf|yocharufshuf]] || [[word:yocharufkuf|yocharufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yocharethe|yocharethe]] || [[word:yochareje|yochareje]] || [[word:yochareshe|yochareshe]] || [[word:yochareke|yochareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yocharothotho|yocharothotho]] || [[word:yocharojojo|yocharojojo]] || [[word:yocharoshosho|yocharoshosho]] || [[word:yocharokoko|yocharokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yocharotho|yocharotho]] || [[word:yocharojo|yocharojo]] || [[word:yocharosho|yocharosho]] || [[word:yocharoko|yocharoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yocharofthof|yocharofthof]] || [[word:yocharofjof|yocharofjof]] || [[word:yocharofshof|yocharofshof]] || [[word:yocharofkof|yocharofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yocharïfthïf|yocharïfthïf]] || [[word:yocharïfjïf|yocharïfjïf]] || [[word:yocharïfshïf|yocharïfshïf]] || [[word:yocharïfkïf|yocharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yocharïfthïfthïf|yocharïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:yocharïfjïfjïf|yocharïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:yocharïfshïfshïf|yocharïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:yocharïfkïfkïf|yocharïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yocharïfthïf|yocharïfthïf]] || [[word:yocharïfjïf|yocharïfjïf]] || [[word:yocharïfshïf|yocharïfshïf]] || [[word:yocharïfkïf|yocharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yocharïfthïf|yocharïfthïf]] || [[word:yocharïfjïf|yocharïfjïf]] || [[word:yocharïfshïf|yocharïfshïf]] || [[word:yocharïfkïf|yocharïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yocharæthæ|yocharæthæ]] || [[word:yocharæjæ|yocharæjæ]] || [[word:yocharæshæ|yocharæshæ]] || [[word:yocharækæ|yocharækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yocharathatha|yocharathatha]] || [[word:yocharajaja|yocharajaja]] || [[word:yocharashasha|yocharashasha]] || [[word:yocharakaka|yocharakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yocharatha|yocharatha]] || [[word:yocharaja|yocharaja]] || [[word:yocharasha|yocharasha]] || [[word:yocharaka|yocharaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yocharafthaf|yocharafthaf]] || [[word:yocharafjaf|yocharafjaf]] || [[word:yocharafshaf|yocharafshaf]] || [[word:yocharafkaf|yocharafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yocharasha|yocharasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yocharshësha|yocharshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yocharosha|yocharosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yocharmusha|yocharmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yocharyasha|yocharyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyocharnkshësha|goyocharnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyocharnkrosha|goyocharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyocharnkmusha|goyocharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyocharnkyasha|goyocharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yochacharasha|yochacharasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochacharshësha|yochacharshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochacharosha|yochacharosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochacharmusha|yochacharmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochacharyasha|yochacharyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochacharnkshësha|goyochacharnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochacharnkrosha|goyochacharnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochacharnkmusha|goyochacharnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochacharnkyasha|goyochacharnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yechærasha|yechærasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yechærshësha|yechærshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yechærosha|yechærosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yechærmusha|yechærmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yechæryasha|yechæryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyechærnkshësha|goyechærnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyechærnkrosha|goyechærnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyechærnkmusha|goyechærnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyechærnkyasha|goyechærnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yochfarasha|yochfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yochfarshësha|yochfarshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yochfarosha|yochfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yochfarmusha|yochfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yochfaryasha|yochfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyochfarnkshësha|goyochfarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyochfarnkrosha|goyochfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyochfarnkmusha|goyochfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyochfarnkyasha|goyochfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
